title: erodium maritimum f. apetalum
intro: Erodium maritimum f. apetalum, also known as the Red-stemmed Geranium, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Geranium family, characterized by its red stems and white, five-petaled flowers. The medicinal properties of Erodium maritimum f. apetalum lie in its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and ulcers, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Erodium maritimum f. apetalum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
